title: Oxford Nanopore Rapid Barcoding with Normalization
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates steps 3-10 of...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates steps 3-10 of the Oxford Nanopore Rapid Barcoding Kit [SQK-RBK110.96](file:///Users/parrishpayne/Downloads/rapid-barcoding-kit-96-sqk-rbk110-96-RBK_9126_v110_revO_24Mar2021-gridion%20(3).pdf). Choose between 16-32 samples per run (> 24 samples requires two 4-in-1 tube racks)

steps.title: Transfer 50 ng genomic DNA per sample
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 ng genomic DNA per sample. Adjust the volume to 9 μl with nuclease-free water. Mix by pipetting.

steps.title: Transfer 1 µL of the Rapid Barcodes to each sample
steps.instruction: Transfer 1 µL of the Rapid Barcodes to each sample. Mix by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate the plate at 30°C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate the plate at 30°C for 2 minutes and then at 80°C for 2 minutes. Then cool the plate to 4°C on the temperature module.

steps.title: Pool all barcoded samples, noting the total volume
steps.instruction: Pool all barcoded samples, noting the total volume.

steps.title: Resuspend the AMPure XP Beads (AXP, or SPRI) by vortexing
steps.instruction: Resuspend the AMPure XP Beads (AXP, or SPRI) by vortexing.

steps.title: To the entire pooled barcoded sample...
steps.instruction: To the entire pooled barcoded sample from Step 4, add an equal volume of resuspended AMPure XP Beads (AXP, or SPRI).

steps.title: Mix by pipetting for 5 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Mix by pipetting for 5 minutes at room temperature.
